commands.purpose: Red gate for pair-loop reviewer sandbox enforcement, COGNOVIS_CORE env override, and temp-dir fleet audit regressions.
commands.observed_result: Expected red failures: 6 failed, 33 passed. Failures showed Codex sandbox_mode was workspace-write for pair-loop reviewers, the defensive guard helper was absent, and scripts/agent-fleet-audit.py did not exist.
commands.name: red-pytest

commands.purpose: Red gate for the simulated installed-fleet smoke section.
commands.observed_result: Expected red failures in the new smoke section: fleet audit failed because scripts/agent-fleet-audit.py was missing, and generated review-agent Codex artifact was workspace-write.
commands.name: red-smoke

commands.purpose: Green gate for the scoped pytest suite, including the real cognovis-core review-agent build with COGNOVIS_CORE set.
commands.observed_result: 39 passed in 6.61s. The cognovis fleet tests ran instead of skipping because COGNOVIS_CORE was set to /Users/malte/code/library/cognovis-core.
commands.name: green-pytest

commands.purpose: Green gate for the smoke script using the real cognovis-core review-agent source and temp Claude/Codex install roots.
commands.observed_result: Summary: 7 passed, 0 failed. The new section built review-agent into simulated Claude and Codex install roots, fleet audit reported one Claude and one Codex agent, and the generated Codex artifact was read-only.
commands.name: green-smoke

commands.command:
BEADS_RUNTIME=${BEADS_RUNTIME:-/Users/malte/.agents/skills/beads} UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache-CL-c6bc uv run python - <<'PY'
import os, sys
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.environ['BEADS_RUNTIME'], 'lib', 'orchestrator'))
from metrics import insert_agent_call
insert_agent_call(
    run_id='fe3c0228-75e1-40ac-8bed-96801930c896', bead_id='CL-c6bc', phase_label='p5-impl',
    agent_label='impl-codex', model='gpt-5.5', iteration=1,
    input_tokens=0, cached_input_tokens=0, output_tokens=0,
    reasoning_output_tokens=0, total_tokens=0, duration_ms=0, exit_code=0
)
PY
commands.purpose: Attempt to log the required implementation metrics row to the canonical beads metrics database.
commands.observed_result: Failed with sqlite3.OperationalError: attempt to write a readonly database. The canonical metrics DB resolved outside the writable sandbox; no fake non-canonical metrics row was written.
commands.name: metrics-log

skipped_checks.reason: Out of scope by prompt; only tests/test_build_agent.py, tests/test_cognovis_agent_fleet_capabilities.py with COGNOVIS_CORE, tests/test_agent_tool_audit.py, and tests/smoke/install-agent-composed.sh were requested.
Explicitly out of scope. These locations were read-only reference fixtures only.
Attempted with the required metrics helper, but the SQLite database path was read-only from this sandbox. The failure is recorded in commands.metrics-log.

artifacts.description: Command evidence ledger for CL-c6bc red and green gates.
